nasb.text: but about this time tomorrow I will send my servants to you, and they will search your house and the houses of your servants; and whatever is desirable in your eyes, they will take in their hand and carry away.’ ”

esv.text: Nevertheless I will send my servants to you tomorrow about this time, and they shall search your house and the houses of your servants and lay hands on whatever pleases you and take it away.’”

cnv.text: 明天大約這個時間，我要差派我的臣僕到你那裡去；他們要搜查你的王宮和你臣僕的家；凡是他們看為寶貴的，他們都要下手拿走。’”

ccb.text: 明天这个时候，我会派属下搜查你的王宫和你臣仆的家，他们要拿走你珍爱的一切。’”
